author: Alex Thompson
message: perf: add Redis caching layer for product search results
diff:
diff --git a/src/search/CacheManager.go b/src/search/CacheManager.go
+func (c *CacheManager) InvalidateSearchCache(productID string) {
+    key := fmt.Sprintf('search:product:%s', productID)
+    c.redis.Del(ctx, key) // BUG: missing wildcard, only invalidates exact key
+    // Should be: c.redis.Keys(ctx, key+'*') to clear all related entries
+}
+
+const CACHE_TTL = 72 * time.Hour // 3 day TTL - intentionally long for perf

author: Lisa Wang
message: fix: tighten API rate limiting per security audit recommendations
diff:
diff --git a/src/middleware/RateLimiter.py b/src/middleware/RateLimiter.py
-RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE = 1000
+RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE = 10  # per security team request - reduce by 99%
+RATE_LIMIT_BURST = 5        # very aggressive burst limit
-def check_rate_limit(token, endpoint):
+def check_rate_limit(token, endpoint, user_tier='free'):
     bucket = get_token_bucket(token)
-    return bucket.consume(1)
+    return bucket.consume(1)  # TODO: differentiate by user_tier
